message:
Normalize question-record shape so V8 sees one hidden class

The bootstrap and call paths were creating q-records with different
field sets:
  bootstrap: { deferred, kind, bootstrapCap }
  call:      { deferred, kind } or { deferred, kind, resultsReader, extract }

V8's hidden-class transitions made #handleReturn's q.extract / q.kind
access sites polymorphic, dropping them out of the inline-cache fast
path. makeQ() constructs every q with the same {deferred, kind,
bootstrapCap, resultsReader, extract} shape — fields default to
undefined when not used, but the hidden class is identical.

Pattern: V8 / SpiderMonkey / TurboFan all reward monomorphic call
sites. Same shape as JIT polymorphic inline caches in HotSpot or
LuaJIT — uniformity at object creation pays off at every read.

Bench: cap-passing flipped from 0.95x to 1.02x of capnweb (now beats
it). Other workloads moved a few percent too — within noise individually
but consistent across runs.
